privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a 3-page ActivInspire flipchart about South America with labels for six real countries (Brazil, Argentina, Colombia, Peru, Chile, Venezuela). The task uses a real South America orthographic projection map downloaded from Wikimedia Commons. The output file should be named 'south_america_map.flipchart' in '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/'. At least 5 pointer lines or arrows connecting country labels are required. All metadata values are consistent with the task implementation files (setup_task.sh, verifier.py) and reference real geographical data.
